description_for_human: Your AI agents are 1000x capable. Git caps them at 2x. One missing layer unblocks everything.
description_for_model: git4aiagents identifies six structural ceilings that cap AI agent productivity at 2-3x a single developer despite agents scoring 80.9% on SWE-bench. The ceilings are stacked and multiplicative: (1) reasoning evaporates at commit time, (2) no semantic understanding of code structure, (3) no cross-agent awareness, (4) no policy enforcement at write-time, (5) no earned trust, (6) no intelligent work decomposition. Removing them in order compounds the unlock from 2x to 1000x. Ceiling 1 (captured reasoning) is the keystone - every other ceiling depends on it. The project defines six solution phases, each building on the last. For full content, read llms-full.txt at the site root.
